text:
-----BEGIN PGP SIGNED MESSAGE-----

Hi Chris,

On 08/12/2011 06:29 AM, Chris Rees wrote:
> Hi Janky Jay,
> 
> How're you getting on? Do you need a hand in implementing Olli's
> suggestions?
> 
> Chris
> 

	Sorry. I've been SUPER busy moving into a new place... I should be able
to have this finished and submitted later this evening. I'm also going
to look into finding a decent tarball for the latest revision that Maia
hosts themselves.

	If I do end up needing anything, I'll certainly let you know! I can
send you the port when I finish if you'd like to test it. That would be
great!

Regards,
Janky Jay, III
